channel.title: Active-Scan on ZAP
channel.description: Recent content in Active-Scan on ZAP

item.title: Even More OWASP PTK Integration with ZAP
item.description: The PTK add-on graduates to beta, the active scan rule is on by default, recommended rule defaults reduce noise by avoiding duplicate findings, and a new Engines tab gives you fine-grained control over when each PTK engine runs.

item.title: Automating OWASP PTK with ZAP (Phase 2)
item.description: ZAP now has a dedicated PTK active scan rule, so you can run the PTK rules in the ZAP active scanner. And there are still more changes planned, but the results against Firing Range have been dramatic!
